nasb.text: and say, ‘What was your mother? A lioness among lions! She lay down among young lions, She reared her cubs.

esv.text: and say: What was your mother? A lioness! Among lions she crouched; in the midst of young lions she reared her cubs.

cnv.text: 說： ‘你的母親是甚麼？ 是獅子群中的母獅， 牠臥在少壯獅子群中， 養育牠的小獅子。

ccb.text: 说， “‘你的母亲像什么？ 她就像狮群中的母狮， 卧在雄壮的狮子中养育幼狮。
